color.description: The color of the alert, applied to its icon, title and description. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

size.description: The size of the popup and its items.

variant.description: The visual style of the popup background.

color.description: The accent color used for highlighted items. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.
The color applied to the group's avatars.

size.description: The size of the group's avatars.

shape.description: The shape of the group's avatars.

size.description: The size of the stack's avatars.
The size of the avatar.

color.description: The color of the fallback background. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast of the fallback for better legibility.

fallback.description: Content shown while the image is loading or when it fails to load. A string is converted to initials (e.g. "Jane Doe" becomes "JD").

size.description: The size of the badge.

variant.description: The visual style of the badge.

color.description: The color of the badge. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The size of the button.

variant.description: The visual style of the button.

color.description: The color of the button. Inherits the theme accent color when not set (gray for the `surface` variant).

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

shortcut.description: A keyboard shortcut hint displayed at the end of the item (display only, not a key binding).

size.description: The size of the menu popup and its items.

color.description: The accent color used for highlighted items. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

variant.description: The visual style of the menu popup background.

size.description: The size of the tab triggers.

color.description: The color of the active tab indicator and label. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

color.description: The color of the breadcrumb items and separators. Passed down to each item unless it sets its own.

orientation.description: The direction the buttons are stacked in.

size.description: The size of the button.

variant.description: The visual style of the button.

color.description: The color of the button. Inherits the theme accent color when not set (gray for the `surface` variant).

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The size of the card: controls its padding and border radius.

variant.description: The visual style of the card.

size.description: The size of the checkbox.

color.description: The color of the checkbox when checked. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The diameter of the progress ring.

color.description: The color of the progress indicator. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

variant.description: The visual style of the popup background.

color.description: The accent color used for highlighted items. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The size shared with the combobox parts (`Input`, `Chips`, `Content`) via context.

align.description: How the label and value are vertically aligned within the row.

color.description: The color of the label text. Inherits the low-contrast gray label styling when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

orientation.description: Whether labels and values are laid out side by side or stacked.

size.description: The size of the list text and spacing.

trim.description: Trims the leading (whitespace above/below the text box) from the start, end, or both sides.

size.description: The size of the field.

color.description: The accent color of the field, used for focus and selection styling.

size.description: The size of the field.

color.description: The accent color of the field, used for focus and selection styling.

size.description: The size of the field.

color.description: The accent color of the field, used for focus and selection styling.

size.description: The size of the dialog: controls its max width, padding and radius, and scales the default `Title` and `Description` sizes.
The size of the chip.

color.description: The color of the chip when checked. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

alignment.description: How cells are aligned within their grid area, following SwiftUI-style alignment names.
How children are aligned vertically within the row.

size.description: The size of the card: controls its padding and border radius.

variant.description: The visual style of the card background.

size.description: The size of the button.

variant.description: The visual style of the button.

color.description: The color of the button. Inherits the theme accent color when not set (gray for the `surface` variant).

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the OTP slots.

size.description: Controls the height, text size and padding of the field.

variant.description: Controls the visual style of the field.

color.description: Overrides the accent color used for the field's background tint and focus ring.

side.description: Which side(s) the inset bleeds into the parent's padding.

clip.description: Whether content is clipped to the parent's border box or padding box.

p.description: Padding on all sides: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

px.description: Horizontal padding: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

py.description: Vertical padding: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

pt.description: Top padding: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

pr.description: Right padding: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

pb.description: Bottom padding: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

pl.description: Left padding: 'current' keeps the parent's padding, '0' removes it.

size.description: The size of the item.

variant.description: The visual style of the item.

size.description: Sets the key cap size on the theme's typographic scale. When unset, the Kbd scales relative to the surrounding text.
Sets the text size on the theme's typographic scale. When unset, the link inherits the size of the surrounding text.

weight.description: Sets the font weight of the link text.

trim.description: Trims the leading (whitespace above and below the text) from the start, end, or both sides.

underline.description: Controls when the link's underline is shown.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for this link. Inherits the theme accent color when unset.

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast color variant for improved accessibility.

size.description: Controls the overall size (height, padding and typography) of the field.

variant.description: Controls the visual style of the field.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the field and its stepper buttons.

buttonLayout.description: Controls where the increment/decrement buttons are placed: on either side of the input, grouped after it, or hidden entirely.

alignment.description: Where `Overlay.Content` is positioned over the base content, using SwiftUI-style alignment (leading/trailing resolve against the writing direction).

size.description: The size of the pagination controls.
Controls the padding and border radius scale of the popover panel.

variant.description: Controls the panel's background treatment (opaque vs. blurred translucent).

size.description: Controls the height of the progress bar.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the indicator (default undefined = inherit the theme accent).

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast indicator color.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the selected item's outline and check icon (default undefined = inherit the theme accent).

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast selected state.

size.description: Controls the size of the radio buttons and their labels.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the selected radio buttons (default undefined = inherit the theme accent).

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast selected state.

size.description: The thickness of the scrollbars.

scrollbars.description: Which scrollbars are rendered, constraining the directions the viewport can scroll in.

type.description: Describes the nature of scrollbar visibility, similar to how the scrollbar preferences in macOS control visibility of native scrollbars. - `"auto"` - scrollbars are visible when content is overflowing - `"always"` - scrollbars are always visible regardless of overflow - `"scroll"` - scrollbars are visible when the user is scrolling - `"hover"` - scrollbars are visible when scrolling or hovering over the scroll area

highContrast.description: Renders the dropdown items in a higher-contrast color variant.

size.description: Controls the overall size of the trigger and dropdown content.

variant.description: Controls the visual style of the trigger button.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the trigger. When omitted, the theme accent color is inherited (the 'surface' variant falls back to gray).

size.description: Controls the length of the separator line.

color.description: Overrides the color of the separator line.

side.description: Which edge the sidebar is docked to.

variant.description: The visual treatment of the sidebar.

collapsible.description: What collapsing does: slide off screen, shrink to an icon rail, or nothing.

size.description: The size of the avatar placeholder, matching Avatar's size scale.

shape.description: The shape of the avatar placeholder, matching Avatar's shapes.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color used for the skeleton's pulse.

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast skeleton.

size.description: The size of the slider's track and thumbs.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for this slider. Inherits the theme accent when omitted.

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast slider.

limit.description: Maximum number of toasts visible at once.

position.description: Position of the toast viewport on screen.

size.description: The size of the spinner.

loading.description: Whether the spinner is shown. When `false`, the component renders its children (if any) instead of the spinner.

size.description: Controls the size of the switch control.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for the checked state (default undefined = inherit the theme accent).

highContrast.description: Renders a higher-contrast checked state.

justify.description: Horizontal alignment of the cell's content.

width.description: Fixed width of the cell's column (any CSS width value; numbers are treated as pixels).

size.description: Controls cell padding and text size throughout the table.

variant.description: Controls the table's visual style ('surface' adds a card-like background and border).

align.description: Vertical alignment of the cells in the row.

size.description: The size of the tab triggers.

color.description: The color of the active tab indicator and label. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The size of the tab triggers.

color.description: The color of the active tab indicator and label. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: Controls the text size and padding of the text area.

variant.description: Controls the visual style of the text area.

color.description: Overrides the accent color used for the text area's background tint and focus ring.

size.description: The size of the toggle.

variant.description: The visual style of the toggle when pressed. Unpressed toggles always render as `ghost`.

color.description: The color of the toggle when pressed. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

content.description: The content displayed inside the tooltip popup.

size.description: The size of the quoted text. Inherits the surrounding text size when not set.

weight.description: The font weight of the quoted text.

color.description: The color of the quoted text. Inherits the surrounding text color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The size of the code text. Inherits the surrounding text size when not set.

variant.description: The visual style of the code snippet.

weight.description: The font weight of the code text.

color.description: The color of the code snippet. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: The size of the heading.

weight.description: The font weight of the heading.

trim.description: Trims the leading (whitespace above/below the text box) from the start, end, or both sides.

color.description: The color of the heading. Inherits the surrounding text color when not set.

highContrast.description: Increases color contrast with the background for better legibility.

size.description: Controls the font size on the type scale. Inherits from the surrounding text when not set.

weight.description: Controls the font weight. Inherits from the surrounding text when not set.

trim.description: Trims the leading (whitespace above/below the text box) from the start, end, or both sides.

color.description: Overrides the theme accent color for this text. Inherits the theme accent color when not set.

highContrast.description: Renders the text in a higher-contrast color variant.

alignment.description: Horizontal alignment of children within the stack, using SwiftUI-style values (leading/trailing resolve against the writing direction).

orientation.description: Controls the scroll axis along which the stacked widgets are laid out and paged.

alignment.description: Two-dimensional alignment of children within the stack, using SwiftUI-style values (leading/trailing resolve against the writing direction).
